title: Highly Recurring Landscaping Biz | $200K Rev | $135K+ SDE | $40K Down!
supportTraining: Owner is willing to introduce all key accounts and support a smooth transition.
description:
Only $40,000 Down

Highly Recurring Landscaping Business | ~$200K Revenue | ~$135K–$140K Owner Benefit | 95%+ Recurring | Equipment Included

Highly efficient, owner-operated landscaping business built on an estimated 95%+ recurring revenue base across ~40 active accounts, generating approximately $200,000 in annual revenue with true owner benefit in the $135,000 to $140,000 range.
Revenue is anchored by long-standing commercial accounts (~70%) with the balance residential. All work is managed through a CRM with no cash jobs, creating a clean, fully verifiable revenue stream.
Operations are intentionally lean with no full-time employees, yet the business consistently produces strong cash flow through recurring mowing, cleanups, trimming, mulch, and winter services.
Includes approximately $50,000 in well-maintained equipment (trucks, trailers, mowers), making this a true turnkey opportunity. A hands-on owner can step in and immediately generate six figures, with clear upside through adding labor and scaling the existing book.
Seller is relocating and will support a smooth transition, including introductions to all accounts to ensure continuity.

Ad#:2495059
